questions.question_text: Guided tour of the workplace, including location of kitchens, toilets and washing facilities — Date

Explanation of any prohibited areas, which must not be entered for reasons of safety or security — Date
Explanation of any prohibited areas, which must not be entered for reasons of safety or security — Student
Explanation of any prohibited areas, which must not be entered for reasons of safety or security — Employer
Fire Alarm and Emergency Evacuation -explanation of what to do in case of an emergency and/or if the fire alarm is activated — Date
Fire Alarm and Emergency Evacuation -explanation of what to do in case of an emergency and/or if the fire alarm is activated — Student
Fire Alarm and Emergency Evacuation -explanation of what to do in case of an emergency and/or if the fire alarm is activated — Employer

First Aid/Medical Emergency Kit - explanation of the first aid & medical emergency facilities, location of the first aid box & Medical emergency kit, the accident book and the identities of the practice's first-aiders — Date

First Aid/Medical Emergency Kit - explanation of the first aid & medical emergency facilities, location of the first aid box & Medical emergency kit, the accident book and the identities of the practice's first-aiders — Student

First Aid/Medical Emergency Kit - explanation of the first aid & medical emergency facilities, location of the first aid box & Medical emergency kit, the accident book and the identities of the practice's first-aiders — Employer
Internal procedures – explanation of the procedure to be followed if the student has problems or concerns or if they are ill or unable to attend their work experience — Date
Internal procedures – explanation of the procedure to be followed if the student has problems or concerns or if they are ill or unable to attend their work experience — Student
Internal procedures – explanation of the procedure to be followed if the student has problems or concerns or if they are ill or unable to attend their work experience — Employer

Signing-in and security procedures –explanation of signing-in procedures — Student
Signing-in and security procedures –explanation of signing-in procedures — Employer
Use of the telephone – explanation of how to access an outside line and contact emergency services if required — Date

Use of the telephone – explanation of how to access an outside line and contact emergency services if required — Employer
Safe systems of work – explanation of any hazards associated with the tasks the student will be carrying out, including a need to adhere to safe working practices — Date

Safe systems of work – explanation of any hazards associated with the tasks the student will be carrying out, including a need to adhere to safe working practices — Employer

Machinery/ Equipment - ensure that the student understands that they can never operate any machinery without the permission of their supervisor and must never do so unless trained. All faults with machinery and equipment must be reported to their supervisor — Date

Machinery/ Equipment - ensure that the student understands that they can never operate any machinery without the permission of their supervisor and must never do so unless trained. All faults with machinery and equipment must be reported to their supervisor — Student

Machinery/ Equipment - ensure that the student understands that they can never operate any machinery without the permission of their supervisor and must never do so unless trained. All faults with machinery and equipment must be reported to their supervisor — Employer
Protective Equipment—Provide students with appropriate personal protective equipment and explain how and when to use it correctly — Date
Protective Equipment—Provide students with appropriate personal protective equipment and explain how and when to use it correctly — Student
Protective Equipment—Provide students with appropriate personal protective equipment and explain how and when to use it correctly — Employer

Manual Handling - explanation of the correct way to lift and carry objects. Ensure student understands why it is important to have instruction on handling and moving specific items in the workplace — Date

Manual Handling - explanation of the correct way to lift and carry objects. Ensure student understands why it is important to have instruction on handling and moving specific items in the workplace — Student

Manual Handling - explanation of the correct way to lift and carry objects. Ensure student understands why it is important to have instruction on handling and moving specific items in the workplace — Employer

Dangerous substances—Explain the rules of handling chemicals in the workplace. Ensure that the student understands that they must ask their supervisor first if they are unsure of the correct precautions to take — Date

Dangerous substances—Explain the rules of handling chemicals in the workplace. Ensure that the student understands that they must ask their supervisor first if they are unsure of the correct precautions to take — Student

Dangerous substances—Explain the rules of handling chemicals in the workplace. Ensure that the student understands that they must ask their supervisor first if they are unsure of the correct precautions to take — Employer

Health and Safety: Ensure that the student understands the importance of following the company's H&S rules and the consequences of breaching those rules — Employer
